description: Legal documents (one on recto and remnants of two on verso) in Arabic script. Might be a deed of sale on recto and deeds of resale on verso. Mentions something "royal" (al-malikī) on recto l. 4, and mentions a stable in the house(الاصطبل), verso, larger section, l. 2. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
